title: Welcome to PRISM Sense
text: This quick tour shows you how to turn your course materials into AI-powered lectures in just a few steps.

title: Manage Sources
text: Click here to upload PDF of lecture notes and chapter reference materials. Once uploaded, PRISM Sense uses it to generate your lecture content.

title: Sources
text: All your uploaded course materials (PDFs, documents) are managed here. Sources are the raw input for AI content generation.

title: Content Types
text: Choose to generate — a Slide Deck followed by Video Lecture. Click a button to start generating AI content for the selected course section.

title: Preview
text: This is where you review generated content before it goes live. Browse through the slides or watch the video, then approve it here to mark it ready for publishing.

title: Generated Content
text: All generated content for this course is listed here. Once you have reviewed it in the preview panel, publish it to make it available to students — or unpublish it at any time.

title: Published Content
text: Published content for students appears here.

title: Credit Balance
text: Each content generation uses credits from your available balance. Your current balance is displayed here.

title: Report Issue
text: Encountered a problem or have a suggestion? Click here to report an issue or share feedback with the PRISM Sense team.
